description_long: This is a standard five-piece drum kit featuring two mounted toms, a floor tom, a snare drum, and a bass drum, all with black shells and white drumheads. The kit includes three metallic cymbals: a hi-hat, a crash, and a ride, each mounted on chrome stands. The hardware, including the stands and drum mounts, is metallic silver, providing structural support and adjustability. The drumheads are taut and smooth, while the shells have a glossy black finish. The cymbals are a bright gold color, likely made of brass or bronze, and have a reflective sheen. This drum kit is typically found in music venues, garages, or urban street performances.
description: A glossy black five-piece drum kit with three gold cymbals on silver stands, featuring white drumheads and metallic hardware. The set is visually striking and suitable for urban music settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five drums, three cymbals, and the symmetrical arrangement of the kit.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the bass drum and the side profile of the cymbals and toms.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bass drum, toms, and the hardware supporting the cymbals.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the floor tom and the side of the hi-hat and crash cymbals.
